summary: Iteration 18 backend testing complete. All 16 tests pass covering P0 idempotent verify-email, P0 expired/invalid tokens, P6 admin manual verify + token invalidation + non-admin auth, P1 join subscription (success, DB persistence, duplicate 400, min-duration 400, invalid service 404), P3 onboarding label 'Ikut patungan pertama (pilih layanan)' with done=True when a subscription exists, P5 welcome retry function importable + callable + user_out serialization intact, and regressions for login/register/services/admin_users/renew.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 2268 lines — approaching the 700-line guideline threshold; consider splitting auth, admin, subscriptions, payments into separate routers (referral is already split as a good precedent).

verify_email endpoint idempotency now relies on token lookup without 'used:False' filter — good; expired-token branch correctly handled with 400. Consider deleting expired tokens via TTL index on expires_at to save DB space.
admin_manual_verify_email correctly invalidates pending tokens (used=True with used_by='admin') and gates on require_admin — good.

user_join_subscription hard-codes role='regular' and group_id=None; admin must later assign a group + activate. Business logic OK, but consider adding response hint about the pending admin-review step for the user.
seed_data_creation: Created ~7-8 TEST_ prefixed users and one TEST_ min-duration service via API during tests. No cleanup performed (test data isolated with TEST_ prefix + unique tokens).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter18 P0/P1/P3/P5/P6 all verified backend-side. Frontend visual verification (VerifyEmail useRef guard, JoinModal, admin manual-verify button, sort dropdowns on Waitlist/Testimonials/Announcements) intentionally skipped per iter18 request — should be tested next iteration if UX changes are being validated.
